sections.paragraph:
συμπεριέχω (Dionys. Hal. 3, 43) to be closely packed in a position around, stand around/together w. κύκλῳ added Lk 12:1 D.

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 959
